name: wide_mux_all_inputs_undef
description: Code should include a multiplexer with all data inputs undefined ('x) that can be optimized away. Wide muxes ($_MUX{4,8,16}_) created by -widemux option should be replaced with undefined when all inputs are 'x, similar to standard $mux optimization.

name: widemux_rom_out_of_bounds
description: Code should include ROM array access with an index that may go out of bounds, combined with -widemux synthesis option. When the index is undefined or out of range, the wide mux selecting from ROM entries should be optimizable to undefined.
